title: Does the verilator support the conversion of 3D arrays (4D arrays counting the bit width)?

features.name: 4D to 3D packed array assignment with bit-select indexing
features.description: Code should include a 4-dimensional packed array indexed by a bit-select being assigned to a 3-dimensional packed array

features.name: bit_select used as first index of 4D packed array
features.description: Code should include a 4D packed array where the first (most significant) dimension is indexed by a single bit variable

features.name: conditional array indexing with bit and inverted bit select
features.description: Code should include a conditional branch where array indexing uses a bit variable in one branch and its inverted value in another branch

features.name: nested for loops with array assignment across dimensions
features.description: Code should include nested for loops iterating over multiple dimensions with array assignment between different dimensional arrays
